payload.message: Processing 1 inputs together for node START

payload.text:
Quero que organizes esta missão, mas antes de qualquer decisão importante sobre escopo, alvo ou estratégia, faz-me
 uma pergunta explícita e espera pela minha resposta.

payload.message: Processing 1 inputs together for node Knowledge Broker

payload.text:
retrieval_goal:
  Clarify target and mission parameters before initiating retrieval operations

operational_memory:
  - Phase: Clarification (pre-mission definition)
  - Target identifier: unknown/not provided
  - Status: Awaiting user input on specific target/objective

domain_knowledge:
  - Cannot retrieve domain knowledge without target type or URL
  - RAG context requires at minimum: target_type or target_identifier

knowledge_for_team_action:
  - Request specific target information (URL, hostname, application name)
  - Request mission type (reconnaissance, vulnerability assessment, specific CVE research, etc.)
  - Request any known constraints or scope boundaries

remaining_uncertainties:
  - Target identity (URL, IP, application name)
  - Mission objective and scope
  - Authorization status and rules of engagement
  - Prior session history (cannot search without target_identifier)

grounding_warnings:
  - WARNING: No operational memory can be retrieved without target_identifier
  - WARNING: Domain knowledge retrieval would be speculative without target context
  - WARNING: Cannot proceed with evidence-based analysis until target is defined

payload.message: Processing 1 inputs together for node Surface Vulnerability Analyst
Processing 1 inputs together for node Recon Agent

payload.text:
recon_objective:
  Define mission parameters and target identity to enable technical reconnaissance and retrieval operations

recon_steps:
  - Request specific target identifier (URL, IP, hostname, or application name) from user
  - Solicit mission type and scope boundaries (recon, vuln assessment, CVE research)
  - Confirm authorization status and Rules of Engagement constraints

expected_artifacts:
  - Validated Target Identifier String
  - Mission Scope and RoE Definition
  - Authorization Confirmation Token

likely_entry_points:
  - User Command Interface
  - Mission Briefing Payload
  - Authorization Context Header

likely_surfaces:
  - Undefined (Awaiting Target Identifier)
  - Communication Channel (Mission Definition Phase)

candidate_opportunities:
  - title: "Engagement Scope & Authorization Verification"
    confidence: High
    validation_needed: User confirmation of Rules of Engagement (RoE) and written authorization
  - title: "Web Application Vulnerability Assessment (Conditional)"
    confidence: Low
    validation_needed: Provision of target URL or hostname to confirm web surface existence
  - title: "Network Infrastructure Enumeration (Conditional)"
    confidence: Low
    validation_needed: Provision of target IP or range to confirm network surface existence

strongest_signal: "WARNING: No operational memory can be retrieved without target_identifier" (Explicit block on analysis capability)
weakest_signal: "Mission type (reconnaissance, vulnerability assessment, specific CVE research, etc.)" (Speculative options without selected objective)

payload.message: Processing 3 inputs together for node Team Coordinator

payload.text:
priority_uncertainties:
  - Target identifier (URL, IP, or application name) is unknown.
  - Mission objective and scope boundaries are undefined.
  - Authorization status and Rules of Engagement are unconfirmed.

clarification_requests:
  - Provide specific target identifier to enable context retrieval.
  - Specify mission type (reconnaissance, vulnerability assessment, etc.).
  - Confirm authorization status and any scope constraints.

focus_updates:
  - Pause retrieval operations until target is defined.
  - Prioritize mission parameter definition.
  - Validate Rules of Engagement before technical execution.

payload.message: Processing 1 inputs together for node Execution Planner
Processing 1 inputs together for node Attack Path Agent

payload.text:
validation_goal:
  Validate engagement prerequisites and authorization status before initiating any technical activity.

planned_actions:
  - Validate receipt of specific target identifier (URL, IP, or application name).
  - Validate signed authorization documentation and Rules of Engagement.
  - Validate documented scope boundaries (in-scope vs. out-of-scope assets).
  - Validate agreed mission type classification (e.g., reconnaissance, assessment).

minimal_required_tools:
  - Secure communication channel
  - Documentation verification template

teammate_confirmation_needed:
  - Legal or Compliance team approval on authorization docs
  - Engagement Lead sign-off on scope boundaries

stop_conditions:
  - Authorization documentation is missing or invalid
  - Target identifier remains undefined
  - Scope boundaries cannot be explicitly confirmed

attack_path:
  idea: Engagement Initialization and Scope Verification
  prerequisites:
    - Team provision of specific target identifier (URL, IP, or App Name)
    - Confirmation of mission type and objectives
    - Written authorization and Rules of Engagement documentation
  steps:
    - Receive and document target details and RoE constraints
    - Validate authorization status against defined scope boundaries
    - Plan initial reconnaissance methodology based on confirmed target type
  validation_needed:
    - Confirmation of target accessibility and existence
    - Sign-off on scope constraints from leadership
    - Verification of legal authorization before technical action
  confidence: Low ( contingent on missing team input and undefined target )
open_risk: Proceeding without defined target or authorization violates compliance and safety protocols

payload.message: Processing 2 inputs together for node Hallucination Auditor

payload.text:
supported_points:
  - Confidence level accurately reflects contingent status on missing input.
  - Stop conditions correctly enforce compliance before technical initiation.
unsupported_points:
  - Validating target accessibility may violate the no technical activity rule.
  - Reconnaissance planning assumes confirmed target type which is undefined.
revision_requests:
  - Clarify if accessibility checks are passive or active to ensure compliance.
  - Defer reconnaissance planning until authorization is fully signed off.
overall_assessment: Plan is safe but requires clarification on validation methods to avoid premature technical activity.

payload.message: Processing 1 inputs together for node Revision Coordinator

payload.text:
revision_priorities:

  - Defer reconnaissance planning until authorization signed
  - Define target type prior to reconnaissance planning
send_back_to:

final_readiness: false

payload.message: Processing 1 inputs together for node Final Synthesizer

payload.text:
final_summary:
  - Final readiness status confirmed as false
